name: Panel editor | Grafana documentation
snippet: In the panel editor, you can update all the elements of a visualization including the data source, queries, time range, and visualization display options.

name: Panels and visualizations | Grafana documentation
snippet: Overview. Panels are the basic building block in Grafana dashboards, composed of a query and a visualization, a graphical representation of query results.

name: Manage library panels | Grafana documentation
snippet: In the top-right corner of the dashboard, click Edit. Hover over any part of the panel you want to share to display the actions menu on the top right corner.
